findings.description: Devcontainer configuration misaligned with trunk (was Django 4.2 + Postgres; trunk uses Django 5.2 + SQLite default)
DisallowedHost 500 error on local Docker run because ALLOWED_HOSTS lacked 0.0.0.0 Host header binding
Container OperationalError translating host name 'db' because web loaded Postgres URL from local .env but Postgres service was commented out

decision: FIXED — aligned devcontainer.json with Django 5.2 + SQLite + Codespace env; added 0.0.0.0 to .env.example ALLOWED_HOSTS; explicitly overrode DATABASE_URL to SQLite in docker-compose.yml
